arts.ttl: Cameron Carter-Vickers surprised after hearing what the Croatian media said about Dinamo Zagreb vs Celtic
arts.sum: The Croatian media hyped up Celtic after they destroyed Ross County last week but it was what they were saying about Dinamo Zagreb that really surprised Hoops hero, Cameron Carter-Vickers . Carter-Vickers missed Celtic’s Champions League fixtures against Atalanta and Borussia Dortmund and here the Hoops defender explains why he’s looking forward to the Zagreb test.

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb star expresses home dressing room confidence ahead of Celtic Champions League clash
arts.sum: However, Dinamo Zagreb have picked up seven Champions League points and are expected to provide a stiff test despite their erratic domestic form under Nenad Bjelica. The Champions League picture for Celtic could become a lot clearer if they claim three points against Dinamo Zagreb this evening in Croatia.

arts.ttl: Richard Keys branded 'weak' for his Celtic and Rangers admission
arts.sum: Ex-Liverpool player Jason McAteer and former Everton striker Andy Gray were the ones giving him stick on beINSPORTS. Richard Keys slammed for flip-flopping between Celtic and Rangers

arts.ttl: Celtic's relentless pursuit of talented youngster who was once wanted by Juventus and Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Undeterred, it appears Celtic is looking to make a January move with the young French midfielder said to want to leave Lyon due to lack of first-team minutes which were promised to Diawara this season. Celtic fans might remember Mahamadou Diawara after Rodgers made an offer for the talented young midfielder a week before transfer deadline day this season.

arts.ttl: Ally McCoist's 'heart breaks' over Celtic being so good and it isn't what Rangers fans want to hear
arts.sum: The Ibrox hero was honest as he admitted they are 'the best' in the country as he talked up their UCL campaign so far

arts.ttl: Celtic predicted XI vs Dinamo Zagreb as Brendan Rodgers stands on brink of history
arts.sum: Potential Celtic starting XI vs Dinamo Zagreb On the flip side, Dinamo Zagreb drew with Slaven Belupo to continue an erratic run of form that has returned five matches without a victory across all competitions.

arts.ttl: What Mark Viduka is telling the Croatian media about Celtic fans ahead of Champions League tie vs Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: The Croatian-born Australian international was brought to Celtic by the late Dr Jo Venglos for £3.5m after Viduka had starred against the Parkhead club for Dinamo Zagreb in a Champions League qualifier which the Hoops lost 3-1 on aggregate. Scoring 31 goals in 39 games for Celtic, Viduka’s Hoops career ended in controversial circumstances after he refused to return in the second half of Celtic’s infamous Scottish Cup defeat to Inverness Caley Thistle during John Barnes’ ill-fated spell at the club.

arts.ttl: Snooker great John Higgins admits Brendan Rodgers has made him 'eat humble pie' at Celtic
arts.sum: Snooker legend John Higgins says he didn’t want Brendan Rodgers back at Celtic Snooker great John Higgins, who is a boyhood Celtic fan, shared that performance was probably the best he had seen the team play.

arts.ttl: Who will win Dinamo Zagreb vs Celtic? Our writers deliver their predictions for Champions League away day
arts.sum: The Hoops are looking to tick off another box at Europe's top table as they bid to end the long awaited run for a win on the road

arts.ttl: Auston Trusty tells Celtic fans why he's really here as he declares 'I want to be best defender in the WORLD'
arts.sum: Trusty won't settle for second best - literally, as he wants to follow Virgil van Dijk and become the best defender on the planet
